mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders(product_id, quantity, order_date) VALUES(#{productId}, #{quantity}, #{orderDate})
mapper.select:
SELECT o.id as id, c.name as categoryName, p.name as productName, p.price as price, o.quantity as quantity, o.order_date as orderDate, o.status as status FROM orders o LEFT JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.order_date) = #{year} AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.order_date) = #{month}
AND o.status = #{status}
